agendaItems.title:
File No. CRA25-15826/CRA25-15429 
CRA Staff to report on the Housing Subsidy Matrix, their operation, how it is set up, and how they are progressing and reaching their goals; further, that the CRA Board have a discussion led by Belix Parks, CRA Community Development Coordinator, in regards to the chart and any other benchmarking from other cities; also, for Belix Parks to discuss what she has learned from the proposals to determine if the chart is correct and what the guidelines will be.  (Original motion for CRA25-15826 initiated by Miranda-Maniscalco on January 16, 2025, and continued from July 24, 2025)(Original motion for CRA25-15429 initiated by Carlson-Clendenin on June 12, 2025)

agendaItems.title:
File No. CRA25-16606 
Resolution of the Community Redevelopment Agency of the City of Tampa, Florida, approving the West Riverwalk Multi-Modal Network and Safety Improvements Grant Funding Agreement to construct a new multimodal network along West Tampa in connection with contract 22-C-00001; Tampa Multimodal Network and Safety Improvements Project by and between said Community Redevelopment Agency (“CRA”) and the City of Tampa, Florida (“Grant Recipient”) on property located within the boundaries of the West Tampa Community Redevelopment Area; authorizing execution of the Community Redevelopment Grant Funding Agreement by the Chair of the CRA and attestation by the CRA Secretary; providing an effective date.

Memorandum from Brenda Thrower, CRA Development Manager, transmitting additional information for said agenda item. (To be R/F)
agendaItems.rawTitle:
File No. CRA25-16606 
Resolution of the Community Redevelopment Agency of the City of Tampa, Florida, approving the West Riverwalk Multi-Modal Network and Safety Improvements Grant Funding Agreement to construct a new multimodal network along West Tampa in connection with contract 22-C-00001; Tampa Multimodal Network and Safety Improvements Project by and between said Community Redevelopment Agency (“CRA”) and the City of Tampa, Florida (“Grant Recipient”) on property located within the boundaries of the West Tampa Community Redevelopment Area; authorizing execution of the Community Redevelopment Grant Funding Agreement by the Chair of the CRA and attestation by the CRA Secretary; providing an effective date.

Memorandum from Brenda Thrower, CRA Development Manager, transmitting additional information for said agenda item. (To be R/F)
agendaItems.background: The project will complete the West Riverwalk within the West Tampa Community Redevelopment Area and will include, but not be limited to, the construction of a shared-use bicycle and pedestrian path along the western bank of the Hillsborough River from the center of West Cass Street to a point near Willow Avenue. At this northern riverfront end, the pathway will include an east-west connection to North Rome Avenue and will include pedestrian improvements through this corridor. The project will exclude a portion of the West Riverwalk path portion between the eastern right-of-way lines of both North Willow Avenue and North Oregon Avenue which portion is to be constructed by the Rome Yard Developer, Related Group, per their Master Development Agreement.

agendaItems.title:
File No. CRA25-17203 
Resolution of the Community Redevelopment Agency of the City of Tampa, Florida, approving extension no. 1 of an existing agreement for the provision of legal services by and between the Community Redevelopment Agency of the City of Tampa, Florida, and the Law Firm of Shepard, Smith, Hand & Brackins, P.A., providing a one (1) year extension to said agreement for the 2026 fiscal year for an amount not to exceed $200,000.00; Authorizing the Chair of the Community Redevelopment Agency to execute said agreement; Providing an effective date.
agendaItems.rawTitle:
File No. CRA25-17203 
Resolution of the Community Redevelopment Agency of the City of Tampa, Florida, approving extension no. 1 of an existing agreement for the provision of legal services by and between the Community Redevelopment Agency of the City of Tampa, Florida, and the Law Firm of Shepard, Smith, Hand & Brackins, P.A., providing a one (1) year extension to said agreement for the 2026 fiscal year for an amount not to exceed $200,000.00; Authorizing the Chair of the Community Redevelopment Agency to execute said agreement; Providing an effective date.
agendaItems.background: CRA staff is requesting an extension to the existing agreement for the provision of legal services by and between the CRA of the City of Tampa, and the Law Firm of Shepard, Smith, Hand & Brackins, P.A., for the 2026 fiscal year for an amount not to exceed $200,000. The CRA Board previously approved a resolution for the legal services of Shepard, Smith, Hand & Brackins P.A., for the 2025 fiscal year (CRA Resolution 2024-23) for the same amount. The resolution and extension to the agreement for the 2026 fiscal year have been provided in addition to the previously approved resolution and agreement for the 2025 fiscal year for reference.

agendaItems.title:
File No. CRA25-17036
Resolution of the Community Redevelopment Agency of the City of Tampa, Florida, approving the purchase of real property in the Channel District Community Redevelopment Area located at 1125 and 1127 east Twiggs Street, Tampa, Florida, for community redevelopment purposes at a purchase price of $4,500,000 together with closing costs in the approximate amount of $50,000, pursuant to a contract for sale and purchase between the City of Tampa, as Purchaser, and A & B Opportunities, Inc., a Florida corporation, as seller; authorizing payment of the purchase price and closing costs associated with the purchase of said parcel of real property with proceeds from the Channel District Land Assemblage Project within the Channel District CRA fund; providing an effective date.

Memorandum from Courtney Orr, CRA Development Manager, transmitting additional information for said agenda item. (To be R/F)
agendaItems.rawTitle:
File No. CRA25-17036
Resolution of the Community Redevelopment Agency of the City of Tampa, Florida, approving the purchase of real property in the Channel District Community Redevelopment Area located at 1125 and 1127 east Twiggs Street, Tampa, Florida, for community redevelopment purposes at a purchase price of $4,500,000 together with closing costs in the approximate amount of $50,000, pursuant to a contract for sale and purchase between the City of Tampa, as Purchaser, and A & B Opportunities, Inc., a Florida corporation, as seller; authorizing payment of the purchase price and closing costs associated with the purchase of said parcel of real property with proceeds from the Channel District Land Assemblage Project within the Channel District CRA fund; providing an effective date.

Memorandum from Courtney Orr, CRA Development Manager, transmitting additional information for said agenda item. (To be R/F)
agendaItems.background:
Staff is seeking approval of expenditure of funds to purchase property at 1125 and 1127 E.

Twiggs St. within the Channel District CRA. The intention of the property purchase will be for the purposes of expansion of Madison Street Park. A sales price of $4.5 million dollars was agreed upon with the seller, exceeding the property's appraised value of $2.9 million. As the property is currently being used for automotive purposes, it will require environmental site assessment and testing. Staff intends to set aside $500,000 from the sale in escrow post- closing for the purposes of completing remediation and to include a Brownfield designation.

(“Grant Recipient”) to restore and renovate the historic Sanchez y Haya building on property located within the boundaries of the East Tampa Community Redevelopment Area; authorizing execution of the Community Redevelopment Grant Funding Agreement by the Chair of the CRA and attestation by the CRA Secretary; providing an effective date.

agendaItems.background: This project was presented to the Board earlier this year.  CRA Staff is requesting final approval for the Resolution and Funding & Construction agreement so that they may begin the construction process.
